phrases.text_local: Perdone, ¿sabe dónde puedo encontrar el mirador de la ermita?
phrases.pronunciation: pehr-DOH-neh, SAH-beh DOHN-deh PWEH-doh en-kohn-TRAHR el mee-rah-DOHR deh lah ehr-MEE-tah?

likely_response.local: Detrás de la ermita, subiendo las escaleras.
likely_response.pronunciation: DEHTRÁS DEH LAH ehr-MEE-tah soo-bee-EHN-doh LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs
likely_response.translation_en: Behind the hermitage, going up the stairs.

responses.english: Behind the hermitage, going up the stairs.
responses.phonetic: DEHTRÁS DEH LAH ehr-MEE-tah soo-bee-EHN-doh LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs
responses.french: Detrás de la ermita, subiendo las escaleras.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Hermitage of Santa Cruz is
phrases.text_local: Perdón, ¿dónde está la Ermita de Santa Cruz?
phrases.pronunciation: pehr-DOHN, DOHN-day eh-STAH lah ehr-MEE-tah day SAHN-tah kroos?

likely_response.local: Suba por la cuesta hasta la plaza.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah POHR LAH koo-EH-stah AH-stah LAH PLAH-thah
likely_response.translation_en: Go up the slope to the square.

responses.english: Go up the slope to the square.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah POHR LAH koo-EH-stah AH-stah LAH PLAH-thah
responses.french: Suba por la cuesta hasta la plaza.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which way to Explanada de España
phrases.text_local: Perdón, ¿qué camino lleva a la Explanada de España?
phrases.pronunciation: Pehr-DOHN, ¿keh kah-MEE-noh YEH-vah ah lah eks-plah-NAH-dah deh eh-SPAH-nyah?

likely_response.translation_en: Go straight down towards the port.

responses.english: Go straight down towards the port.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where traditional tapas bars are
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde puedo encontrar bares de tapas tradicionales?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh PWEH-doh en-koo-EN-trah bah-RES deh TAH-pahs trah-dee-syoh-NAH-les?

likely_response.local: En Calle Villegas y Calle del Cid.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN KAHL-leh beel-LEH-gahs Y KAHL-leh DEHL THEED
likely_response.translation_en: In lower streets, near the square.

responses.english: In lower streets, near the square.
responses.phonetic: EHN KAHL-leh beel-LEH-gahs Y KAHL-leh DEHL THEED
responses.french: En Calle Villegas y Calle del Cid.
